title: canthium major
intro: Canthium major, also known as the Black Berry, is a species of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family. It is native to tropical Africa and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The plant's leaves and berries are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Canthium major can be prepared as a tea or infused oil for medicinal use, and is also used in some herbal remedies for its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health.
